title: medical — data retention windows
description: Health data — HIPAA + insurance + litigation horizons. Injuries + clearances retained 10 years (12 years Enterprise for pediatric records — statute of limitations tolling until majority). Medical records NEVER hard-deleted while active; archived to cold on tenant erasure.

policies.description: 10 years post-athlete-archival. NEVER hard-deleted — archived to cold storage. Blocks DSAR erasure — subject to LegalHold rules per compliance.
10 years post-status='cleared'. Pediatric records: 12 years Enterprise (medical.pediatric_retention entitlement) to cover statute of limitations tolling.
10 years co-terminous with parent Injury. Notes remain encrypted at rest through cold archive.
10 years post-expiry. Clearance provenance is legally load-bearing (proves eligibility gate was open at match time).
7 years post-athlete-archival. Anonymized on purge (allergen kept for aggregate stats; notes cleared).
7 years post-discontinuation. Full encryption preserved through cold archive.
